metric_name: Weekly PC market trend commentary
metric_value: Spring Cleaning It's spring. Dell is cutting prices.
notes: Kastner market assessment for week of 2003-04-13

metric_name: Best Buy: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: At Best Buy stores this week, save $150 by mail on all notebooks, enjoy no interest for 12 months on PC bundles, and take advantage of free shipping on creation station PCs. BestBuy.com still offers free shipping.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: Receive a $100 gift card with any PC purchase at Circuit City stores. Circuitcity.com has reintroduced free shipping on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: Get a free HP 3425 printer after rebates with any computer & monitor bundle. PC Deals included this free printer offer in the "Printer" column for all CompUSA bundled deals.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: Wow! This is the week to purchase a PC from Dell.com.

metric_name: eMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: EMachines has once again revamped its line of models. If you were thinking about buying a T2460, T2042, or T1842, you're now out of luck because these models are gone from all the usual sources we check.

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: Gateway.com has finally joined the free shipping bandwagon for good. At least that's what we're inferring from its new "Shipping always included" label under the price of any model you configure.

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: Sony.com offers a plethora of models right now, although, like eMachines, the best deals usually come from bundled retail offers. That being said, if you're interested in a PCV-RZ series Sony PC, then you'll want to customize one at Sony.com.

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: HP Online offers competitive prices on its retail models, although national retailers always have the better bundled deals. PC Deals customized a Compaq 8000 series PC at hp.com with a 3.06GHz processor, expecting this desktop to be lower in price than its HP counterpart.

metric_name: Intel Pentium 4 HT: positioning in week of 2003-04-13
metric_value: On the other hand, if you are not yet quite at the buying point with Dell or any other PC supplier, a time out for a week might reveal a whole new spring lineup of Intel microprocessors and chipsets - and wholesale price cuts on today's chips.
